THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT MCNIE, DOUGLAS DBA MCGREGOR COMMUNICATIONS RECOVER FROM APPELLANT ROBERTSON, SCOTT DBA HOUSING CORP INC (150910) $5,148.45 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $180.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,478.45, ; ON THE CROSS-COMPLAINT, APPELLANT/DEFENDANT/CROSS-COMPLAINANT SCOTT ROBERTSON DBA HOUSING CORPS INC., IS AWARDED $800.00. THE TOTAL JUDGMENT IS IN FAVOR OF RESPONDENT/PLAINTIFF/CROSS-DEFENDANT MCNIE AND AGAINST APPELLANT/DEFENDANT/CROSS-COMPLAINANT ROBERTSON IN THE AMOUNT OF $4,678.45. ($5,478.45 MINUS $800.00). INTEREST ACCRUES AT LEGAL RATE FROM DATE JUDGMENT IS ENTERED. COURT ORDERS RESPONDENT MCNIE TO RETURN CERTAIN MATERIALS BY MAY-15-09. APPELLANT ROBERTSON ORDERED TO RETURN THE STRIKER BY MAY-15-09.
